case_studies.title: Cross-Border Fintech Wallet Mobile App
case_studies.summary: Built a compliant cross-border mobile wallet enabling instant transfers, KYC, and FX for consumers in 3 regions.
case_studies.description: Globex Pay partnered with our team to launch a cross-border mobile wallet focused on emerging markets. We delivered native iOS and Android apps with secure onboarding, automated KYC flows, multi-currency wallets, and real-time FX rates. The backend integrates with multiple payment gateways and AML providers, and the system is fully audited for PCI and GDPR compliance.

case_studies.title: Digital Lending Mobile App for SME Financing
case_studies.summary: Delivered a digital lending mobile app for SMEs with automated underwriting and bank data integrations.
case_studies.description: NovaLend Capital needed a modern mobile-first experience for their SME lending product. We designed and implemented an onboarding flow, document upload and verification, automated risk scoring, and real-time loan status tracking. The app integrates with open banking APIs to analyze cash flow and uses a rules engine to provide instant approvals for low-risk applicants.

case_studies.title: Multi-Vendor E-commerce Marketplace
case_studies.summary: Built a scalable multi-vendor marketplace with advanced search, promotions, and analytics.
case_studies.description: UrbanCart wanted to unify local vendors under one marketplace. We developed a responsive web application with vendor dashboards, catalog management, order tracking, promotions, and reporting. The platform supports dynamic pricing, coupon campaigns, and integrates with multiple logistics partners for last-mile delivery.

case_studies.title: Telemedicine Platform for Remote Consultations
case_studies.summary: Delivered a HIPAA-compliant telemedicine solution on web and mobile.
case_studies.description: CareLink Health needed a secure telemedicine platform connecting patients with physicians. We implemented appointment scheduling, video consultations, prescription management, and integration with existing EMR systems. The product includes responsive web portals for doctors and patients plus companion mobile apps.

case_studies.title: Cloud LMS for Corporate Training
case_studies.summary: Implemented a SaaS LMS for corporate compliance and skills training.
case_studies.description: TalentGrow Academy engaged us to rebuild their learning management system as a multi-tenant SaaS. We delivered course authoring tools, SCORM support, quizzes, certificates, and reporting dashboards. The platform supports single sign-on and integrates with HRIS systems.

case_studies.title: Modular ERP Backend Modernization
case_studies.summary: Re-architected a monolithic ERP into modular services with clear domain boundaries.
case_studies.description: Helio Manufacturing's legacy ERP struggled with scalability and long release cycles. We split the monolith into domain-driven services for inventory, purchasing, and invoicing, introduced event-driven communication, and implemented CI/CD. This reduced deployment risk and improved system reliability.

case_studies.title: B2B SaaS Analytics Platform
case_studies.summary: Launched a B2B analytics SaaS with real-time dashboards and white-labeling.
case_studies.description: InsightLoop needed an analytics SaaS that customers could embed into their own products. We built a multi-tenant platform with data ingestion pipelines, configurable dashboards, and role-based access control. Customers can white-label the UI and embed widgets into their systems via secure tokens.

case_studies.title: Urban Mobility Booking Platform
case_studies.summary: Created a unified app for bikes, scooters, and car-sharing services.
case_studies.description: CityMove wanted to simplify urban transportation bookings. We built a mobile app that aggregates multiple mobility providers into a single interface with route planning, pricing comparison, and one-click booking. The system supports real-time vehicle availability and integrates with third-party APIs.

case_studies.title: Web Trading Platform for Retail Investors
case_studies.summary: Implemented a responsive trading platform with real-time quotes and portfolio tracking.
case_studies.description: BrightTrade needed a modern trading interface targeting first-time retail investors. We built a web platform that offers real-time quotes, watchlists, fractional shares, and educational content. A secure backend integrates with a broker API, handles order routing, and enforces regulatory limits.

case_studies.title: Employee Wellness Mobile Companion App
case_studies.summary: Developed a wellness companion app integrated with corporate HR systems.
case_studies.description: Wellbeing Inc. wanted to increase engagement with their wellness programs. We built a mobile app with activity challenges, mental health check-ins, and rewards. It integrates with wearables and HR systems to sync benefits and incentives securely.

engagement_models.name: Dedicated Team
engagement_models.shortDescription: Long-term, dedicated engineers working as an extension of your in-house team.
engagement_models.fullDescription: Our Dedicated Team model is ideal for ongoing product development and scaling engineering capacity. You get a cross-functional squad of developers, QA engineers, and a delivery lead who work exclusively on your roadmap. Engagements typically start from one senior engineer and can scale up to full pods with product and design support. The team follows your ceremonies and tools while we handle recruitment, HR, and operations.

engagement_models.name: Fixed-Price Project
engagement_models.shortDescription: Scoped projects with a clear fixed budget and timeline.
engagement_models.fullDescription: The Fixed-Price Project model is best suited for well-defined scopes such as MVPs, redesigns, or feature-focused releases. Together we run a short discovery phase, define deliverables, timelines, and acceptance criteria, then commit to a fixed budget. You get predictable costs and a dedicated delivery team for the duration of the project.

jobs.title: Senior Backend Developer (Go / Microservices, Remote)
jobs.summary: High-impact Senior Backend Developer role working on a globally distributed payments platform. Fully remote within the US.
jobs.description: Northbridge Tech is hiring a Senior Backend Developer to lead the design and implementation of microservices powering our next-generation payments platform. You will own critical services, work with staff engineers on architecture, and collaborate with product teams on feature delivery. Tech stack includes Go, PostgreSQL, gRPC, and AWS. Competitive compensation with meaningful equity.

jobs.title: Senior Backend Developer (Python / Django, Remote USA)
jobs.summary: Remote Senior Backend Developer role building data products for enterprise customers across the US.
jobs.description: BrightScale Analytics is looking for a Senior Backend Developer with strong Python and Django experience. You will build and maintain APIs that serve analytics dashboards, optimize data pipelines, and collaborate with data scientists. The role is fully remote in the United States with flexible working hours and strong benefits.

jobs.title: Senior Backend Developer (Node.js, Remote)
jobs.summary: Senior Backend Developer role for a cloud file-sync platform serving millions of users. Fully remote within the US.
jobs.description: CloudSync Labs is scaling our backend team with a Senior Backend Developer experienced in Node.js and event-driven architectures. In this role you will design resilient services, improve system observability, and mentor mid-level engineers. Our stack includes Node.js, TypeScript, Kafka, PostgreSQL, and Kubernetes on AWS.

jobs.title: Part-time Junior Frontend Developer – London (Start April 2026)
jobs.summary: Part-time junior role for students or recent graduates. Start date: April 2026. Hybrid work from our London office.
jobs.description: Riverstone Digital is seeking a part-time Junior Frontend Developer to support our client website builds. This role is ideal for students or recent graduates looking to gain agency experience. You will work 3 days per week with mentorship from a senior engineer. Start date is in April 2026, with the possibility to transition to full-time later in the year.

jobs.title: Part-time Product Marketing Internship – London (April 2026 Start)
jobs.summary: On-site part-time internship role in London with a clear start date in April 2026.
jobs.description: Skyline HR Tech is hiring a part-time Product Marketing Intern to support campaign execution and content production for our HR SaaS. This internship starts in April 2026 and runs for 6 months. You will work closely with our product marketing manager and design team.

jobs.title: React Developer (Remote, US)
jobs.summary: Remote React Developer role focused on building analytics dashboards for B2B clients.
jobs.description: ClearView Solutions is seeking a mid-level React Developer to join our distributed frontend team. You will work on a suite of analytics dashboards and customer portals, collaborating closely with design and backend teams. This is a fully remote role for candidates based in the United States.

jobs.title: Senior React Developer (Remote, Europe)
jobs.summary: Senior React Developer for a European e-commerce platform. Fully remote across the EU.
jobs.description: NovaCommerce is expanding its frontend team and is looking for a Senior React Developer to own critical parts of our storefront and internal tools. You will work closely with product managers and designers to deliver high-performing UIs using React, Next.js, and TypeScript.

jobs.title: Mid-level Node.js Developer (6-month Contract, Remote EU)
jobs.summary: 6-month contract Node.js role building APIs for a European fintech, fully remote across the EU.
jobs.description: FinEdge Systems is hiring a mid-level Node.js Developer to support a regulatory reporting project for one of our banking clients. You will build and maintain APIs, work on data integrations, and collaborate with a distributed team.

jobs.title: Backend Engineering Internship (Python, Remote Europe)
jobs.summary: Remote internship for students interested in backend development using Python.
jobs.description: DataSpring is offering a 6-month remote internship for students who want to learn backend development in a real-world analytics product. You will contribute to API endpoints, internal tools, and monitoring dashboards with guidance from senior engineers.

jobs.title: Senior Backend Engineer (Java, Hybrid NYC)
jobs.summary: 12-month contract senior backend role for a mobility platform. Hybrid in New York.
jobs.description: Urban Mobility Co. is looking for a Senior Backend Engineer to support the next phase of our mobility booking platform. You will work on trip planning, payments, and partner integrations using Java, Spring Boot, and Kafka.

jobs.title: Technical Project Manager (Fixed-Price Software Projects)
jobs.summary: Remote Technical Project Manager overseeing fixed-price delivery squads.
jobs.description: Vertex Labs is hiring a Technical Project Manager with experience managing fixed-price software projects. You will oversee cross-functional teams, manage scope and delivery timelines, and communicate with clients across North America and Europe.

jobs.title: Junior Full-stack Developer (Remote UK, May Start)
jobs.summary: Remote junior full-stack role for UK-based candidates starting May 2026.
jobs.description: BrightLeaf CRM is hiring a Junior Full-stack Developer to help build features across our Node.js and React stack. You will work within a small squad, receive mentorship, and contribute to our customer-facing CRM product.

jobs.title: Backend Engineer (Ruby on Rails, Remote US)
jobs.summary: Remote backend role for a SaaS observability product built on Ruby on Rails.
jobs.description: Signal Insight is growing its engineering team with a Backend Engineer to work on core product features, performance, and integrations. You will collaborate with product and SRE teams in a fully remote environment.

jobs.title: Temporary QA Engineer (On-site Paris, 3 months)
jobs.summary: Three-month temporary QA Engineer contract on-site in Paris.
jobs.description: MetroMedia is looking for a QA Engineer to support a major product launch over the next 3 months. You will work on regression suites, exploratory testing, and assist in setting up automated test pipelines.
